events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Scenario: crimp ring fails go/no-go gauge on PEX & copper installation, rough-complete, commercial. Crimp ring failing go/no-go gauge means defective connection, not compliant with manufacturer specs and IPC. Decision fail. Risk high? Failed crimp can cause leaks, water damage, but at rough stage not pressurized. Non-compliant, installed-defective. Need percent_complete maybe 80? Value 0. Sound_source etc default empty string/0. Workable empty. Findings: crimp ring does not pass go/no-go gauge; PEX connection not made per manufacturer. Actions: remove/replace failed crimp ring, re-crimp with proper tool, verify with go/no-go gauge, inspect/test. Rationale: go/no-go gauge verification is required; failure indicates improper crimp, not compliant with IPC and mfr. References: IPC 605.16? Actually PEX fittings. Manufacturer installation instructions. IPC 605.16 maybe PEX tubing and fittings shall be installed per manufacturer's instructions. Also IPC 605.16.1? Let's recall IPC sections: PEX tubing and fittings: Section 605.16 PEX tubing and fittings. Installation per manufacturer's instructions. Crimp ring must be gauged. Use IPC 605.16, manufacturer specifications. Need JSON shape exactly. Ensure no prose outside JSON.
